title: Fintech Data Pipeline
description: End-to-end modern data stack demo moving digital banking data from source tables through Airbyte-style extraction, warehouse storage, dbt models, and BI output.
insights: Modeled customers, accounts, transactions, loans, and fraud alerts for a digital banking analytics platform.
Produced marts for transaction facts, customer dimensions, channel performance, fraud metrics, and loan portfolio health.
Generated $7.4M transaction volume, 376 active customers, and 24 confirmed fraud cases for analytics reporting.
